testcase.classname: GET /api/tasks should return list of tasks
testcase.name: GET /api/tasks should return list of tasks

testcase.classname: GET /api/tasks should return empty array when no tasks
testcase.name: GET /api/tasks should return empty array when no tasks

testcase.classname: GET /api/tasks should return 500 on database error
testcase.name: GET /api/tasks should return 500 on database error

testcase.classname: POST /api/tasks should create a new task
testcase.name: POST /api/tasks should create a new task

testcase.classname: POST /api/tasks should return 400 if title is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/tasks should return 400 if title is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/tasks should return 400 if title is empty string
testcase.name: POST /api/tasks should return 400 if title is empty string

testcase.classname: PUT /api/tasks/:id should return 404 if task not found
testcase.name: PUT /api/tasks/:id should return 404 if task not found

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/tasks/:id should return 500 on database error
